payload.message: Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 Sitting Reminder: You have been sitting for a while. Stand up, stretch, and walk around for 5 minutes! Your back will thank you.'

Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 Mid-morning Break: Time to stand up and stretch! Walk around for a few minutes before continuing work.'

Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 Pre-lunch Stretch: Almost lunchtime! Stand up and do some light stretching before heading out.'
Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 Afternoon Break: Post-lunch slump is real. Get up, walk around, and refresh your energy!'
Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 Late Afternoon Break: Almost done for the day. Take a quick stretch break!'

Send a sitting break reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🪑 End of Day Stretch: Last reminder of the day. Stand up, stretch those shoulders, and prepare for your commute!'

Send a weight tracking reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='⚖️ Weight Check: Time to weigh yourself! Reply with your weight and I will log it for you.'

Send a morning commute reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🚇 Morning Commute: The 7:57 subway is arriving soon! Grab your stuff and head to the station. Check for any service delays.'

Send an evening commute reminder to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='🚇 Evening Commute: The 18:47 subway is arriving soon! Time to wrap up and head to the station.'

Check the weather forecast for Beijing and send the user an alert if rain, snow, or extreme temperatures are expected. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 with weather details and commute advice.

Check tomorrow's weather forecast for Beijing and send the user a summary for tomorrow's commute. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 with tomorrow's forecast and clothing/umbrella suggestions.

Generate the weekly report by reading worklog-data.json and weekly-report-config.json from workspace. Summarize completed tasks, pending items, and key metrics. Send via: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 with the formatted report.
Send a test message to the user. Use: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 message='Test message - configuration verified!'

Run the server memory monitor script at /home/node/workspace/server-monitor.sh and check system resources. If available memory drops below 300MB, send an alert via: message action=send channel=telegram to=5992622663 with memory usage details and recommendations.
